description.value: Price 2,700 gp; Slot shoulders; CL 1st; Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint enchantment DESCRIPTION Note This item is associated with a specific deity. This brilliant red cloak bears a golden symbol of an upright winged sword. The wearer can use bless once per day. If the associated deity is the wearer’s patron, the wearer gains a +1 enhancement bonus to natural armor. As a standard action, the wearer can create an illusory image of the Inheritor’s banner, which floats 2 to 5 feet above the wearer’s head and remains in place as long as the wearer is conscious. If the wearer has the banner class feature, she can use this battle standard as her banner. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 1,350 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item, barkskin, bless, silent image
